rationale: The cited paper is the core prior finding that this article is built to extend, not a peripheral mention; the introduction and abstract explicitly state that the study extends the Anderson et al. result. The citing paper includes a dedicated discussion of Anderson et al. (2015), repeatedly contrasts its own scope with that paper, and frames its contribution as broadening the harbinger phenomenon beyond individual customers and a single retailer. The empirical setup also follows the original logic (classification/validation splits and analogous product-success regressions), showing clear conceptual and design-level dependence.
relation_description: The citing paper directly extends Anderson et al. (2015) by generalizing harbingers of failure from individual customers to zip-code segments and testing the effect across additional domains and retailers. It preserves the original line of inquiry while adding broader contexts and portability claims.
